# RECRUITER-RESPONSE — Recruiter Reply

## When

Use during job-search or externalization blocks.

## Purpose

Prevent recruiter messages from aging into avoidable backlog.

## Inputs

- Recruiter message
- Current CV/LinkedIn
- Role fit notes
- Availability / salary constraints if needed
- Reply template if available

## Steps minimum

1. Read the message.
2. Classify fit and urgency.
3. Choose reply type: interested, clarify, decline, hold.
4. Send concise response.
5. Update job pipeline if useful.

## Output

Recruiter thread advanced.

## Tick valid when

The recruiter message no longer requires immediate unprocessed attention.

## Stop rule

Do not rewrite the whole professional profile while answering one recruiter.
